text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is about to begin! Of
course, everyone has their attention fixed on the
battle between the Empress, Air Groove, and the
Otherworldly Front-Runner, Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The stands are awash with excitement! Everyone's
on the edge of their seat!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
I bet Suzuka's gonna fly ahead and leave Air
Groove in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text: I was at the Sapporo Kinen, so I know Air Groove's got this in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm just about to see Air Groove off.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: We've come all this way.
choice_data_list: All that's left is to run.
All that's left is to run.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. I just need to give it everything I have.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sorry to have kept you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm so relieved.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: About what?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I can feel your power again. You're back to the
Air Groove I know so well.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Actually... not quite.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: There's still something different about you now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You look faster and sharper than the last time we
raced. It feels like you might get ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're stronger than I've ever seen you. That's the
feeling I get.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I really enjoyed running in the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And looking at you now... I feel like I can run even
faster than back then.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's exactly what I wanted to hear, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to seeing you run even faster than
at the Takarazuka Kinen... before I pass you and
claim my victory.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Good. But don't expect me to go down without a
fight.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm heading out now. Let's have a good race out
there.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. I'm not afraid any longer.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's right. Believe in me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am the Empress. I am the challenger who drives
all Umamusume forward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: And... I'm your ideal.
